title: Jaigad Fort
tagline: Jaigad Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Jaigad Fort, Jayagaḍa killā) (Also transliterated as Zyghur in old British records.) is a coastal fortification that is located at the tip of a peninsula in Jaigad, Ratnagiri Distr
overview.description: Jaigad Fort, Jayagaḍa killā) (Also transliterated as Zyghur in old British records.) is a coastal fortification that is located at the tip of a peninsula in Jaigad, Ratnagiri District at a distance of 14 km from the temple town of Ganpatipule, in the state of Maharashtra, India. Nestled on a cliff, it overlooks a bay formed where the Shastri river enters the Arabian Sea. It has a commanding view of the bay, the nearby power plant and the open sea. A jetty port Angrey, and a lighthouse is located nearby.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: JSW Ratnagiri Power Station
topPlaces.description: JSW Ratnagiri Power Station is a coal-based thermal power plant located in Nandiwade village near Jaigad in Ratnagiri district Maharashtra. The power plant is operated by the JSW Energy Limited (JSWEL).

topPlaces.name: Shastri River
topPlaces.description: Shastri River is a river in Ratnagiri district of Maharashtra. It originates near Prachitgad, flows near Sangameshwar and meets Arabian Sea near Jaigad Fort.

topPlaces.name: Jaigad Port
topPlaces.description: Jaigad Port also officially known as JSW Jaigarh Port is a sea port in Jaigad, Maharashtra, on the eastern coast of the Arabian Sea. The port is operated by JSW Infrastructure.

topPlaces.name: Angré Port
topPlaces.description: Angré Port is an all-weather port located in Jaigad, Maharasthra on the coast of Konkan. The port has cargo facility as well as industrial park attached to it.The port has 300 acres of industrial land for warehouse and logistics.

topPlaces.name: Vijaygad Fort
topPlaces.description: Vijaygad Fort / (Marathi: विजयगड किल्ला) is a fort located 60 km from Chiplun, in Ratnagiri district, of Maharashtra. This fort is located north of the Jaigad Fort on the northern bank of shastri river creek.

topPlaces.name: Saitavde
topPlaces.description: Saitavde, or Saitawada, is a small village on the Jaigad creek in Ratnagiri district. It is about 390 km southwest of Mumbai, and about 58 km to the north of Ratnagiri city.

topPlaces.name: Velneshwar
topPlaces.description: Velneshwar is a village on the western coast of Maharashtra, India, about 70 kilometres (43 mi) from Ratnagiri. Velneshwar is known for its rock-free beach.

itinerary.title: Day 1 — JSW Ratnagiri Power Station & around

items.note: JSW Ratnagiri Power Station is a coal-based thermal power plant located in Nandiwade village near Jaigad in Ratnagiri district Maharashtra. The power plant is operated by the JSW Energy Limited (JSWEL).
Shastri River is a river in Ratnagiri district of Maharashtra. It originates near Prachitgad, flows near Sangameshwar and meets Arabian Sea near Jaigad Fort.
Jaigad Port also officially known as JSW Jaigarh Port is a sea port in Jaigad, Maharashtra, on the eastern coast of the Arabian Sea. The port is operated by JSW Infrastructure.

Angré Port is an all-weather port located in Jaigad, Maharasthra on the coast of Konkan. The port has cargo facility as well as industrial park attached to it.The port has 300 acres of industrial land for warehouse and logistics.

Vijaygad Fort / (Marathi: विजयगड किल्ला) is a fort located 60 km from Chiplun, in Ratnagiri district, of Maharashtra. This fort is located north of the Jaigad Fort on the northern bank of shastri river creek.
Saitavde, or Saitawada, is a small village on the Jaigad creek in Ratnagiri district. It is about 390 km southwest of Mumbai, and about 58 km to the north of Ratnagiri city.
Velneshwar is a village on the western coast of Maharashtra, India, about 70 kilometres (43 mi) from Ratnagiri. Velneshwar is known for its rock-free beach.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jaigad Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jaigad Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jaigad Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kolhapur Airport (134 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (153 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jaigad Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jaigad Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jaigad Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Jaigad Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jaigad Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are JSW Ratnagiri Power Station, Shastri River, Jaigad Port, Angré Port, Vijaygad Fort.
